title: Microbiome metabolites
script_summary: Explaining the fascinating role of microbiome metabolites in human health.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about microbiome metabolites.
Microbiome metabolites are tiny compounds produced by bacteria in our gut.
These metabolites can influence everything from digestion to mood.
Research shows they can even affect our immune system.
However, some studies are still preliminary, so stay tuned!
Curious about how your gut health impacts you? Follow for more science-based insights!
